title: Levels of banded support for solar PV under the Renewables Obligation for the period 1 April 2013 to 31 March 2017
body: "This consultation is now closed. The Government would like to thank respondents for their contributions to the consultation. Details of the Government’s decisions are set out in the Government response which was published on 18 December and can be found below. A press notice is available in the News section of the DECC website.  The consultation invited your views on the proposed support for solar PV generating stations under the Renewables Obligation which are accredited or add additional capacity on or after 1 April 2013. We invited interested parties to submit comments and evidence in response to these proposals.  Post consultation documents  Documents  **Please note: **An update has been issued (3 October) to correct an error in Table 3 of the consultation document and in Table 5 of the accompanying impact assessment. The relevant unit of capital cost and annual O&M cost should be £/kW not £/MW.  Contact us  Tel: 0300 068 5404 Email: robr@decc.gsi.gov.uk Post: Renewables Obligation Team  Department of Energy and Climate Change, Area 4A  3 Whitehall Place  London  SW1A 2AW "
